<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>
I’m using the security finding-discovery workflow for this bounded diff review, focusing only on the five assigned issuer-package files and their direct security context.

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' /Users/cysp/.codex/plugins/cache/openai-curated-remote/codex-security/0.1.11/skills/finding-discovery/SKILL.md && printf '\\n-- GUIDANCE --\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/01_context/security_guidance.md && printf '\\n-- THREAT MODEL --\\n' && sed -n '1,320p' /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/01_context/threat_model.md","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' /Users/cysp/.codex/plugins/cache/openai-curated-remote/codex-security/0.1.11/references/security-guidance.md && printf '\\n-- SHARED LEDGER RULES --\\n' && sed -n '1,320p' /Users/cysp/.codex/plugins/cache/openai-curated-remote/codex-security/0.1.11/skills/security-scan/references/scan-artifacts-and-ledger.md && printf '\\n-- ARTIFACT PATHS --\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' /Users/cysp/.codex/plugins/cache/openai-curated-remote/codex-security/0.1.11/references/scan-artifacts.md","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"scan_dir=/var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z
printf '%s\n' '-- ASSIGNED WORKLIST ROWS --'
rg -n -F -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/package.json' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/src/issuer.ts' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/package.json' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/package.json' "$scan_dir/artifacts/02_discovery/deep_review_input.jsonl"
printf '%s\n' '-- CURRENT FILES --'
for f in packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/package.json packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/src/issuer.ts packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/package.json packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/package.json; do
  printf '\n### %s\n' "$f"
  nl -ba "$f"
done
printf '%s\n' '-- DIFFS BASE...HEAD --'
for f in packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/package.json packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/src/issuer.ts packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/package.json packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/package.json; do
  printf '\n### %s\n' "$f"
  git diff --no-ext-diff --unified=80 99475317089cc75f1451b1893ea31ccd17284a92...eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287 -- "$f"
done","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -S --glob '!node_modules' 'githubActionsIssuerAdapter|flyMachineIssuerAdapter|flyTrustedIssuerForOrgSlug|OidcIssuerAdapter|validateSubjectTokenBinding|trustedIssuers' packages workers | head -n 240 && printf '\\n-- DIRECT OIDC SUPPORT FILES --\\n' && for f in packages/oidc/src/issuer-adapter.ts packages/oidc/src/verifier.ts packages/oidc/src/index.ts; do test -f \"$f\" && { printf '\\n### %s\\n' \"$f\"; nl -ba \"$f\"; }; done && printf '\\n-- POLICY ENTRY SUPPORT --\\n' && rg -l -S --glob '!node_modules' 'validateTokenPolicyRules|tokenPolicy|authorize.*policy|policy.*authorize|evaluate.*policy' packages workers | head -n 30","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"printf '%s\n' '-- TOKEN AUTHENTICATION AND ADAPTER WIRING --'
for f in workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/oidc-issuers.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/dependencies.ts; do
  printf '\n### %s\n' "$f"
  nl -ba "$f"
done
printf '%s\n' '-- POLICY MODULE CANDIDATES --'
rg --files packages workers | rg '(token.*policy|policy.*token|authorization|authoriz)'","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"printf '%s\n' '-- ASSIGNED ADAPTER TESTS (DIRECT SUPPORT) --'
for f in packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/test/issuer.test.ts packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/test/issuer.test.ts; do
  printf '\n### %s\n' "$f"
  nl -ba "$f"
done
printf '%s\n' '-- LEDGER TAIL --'
tail -n 20 /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/02_discovery/work_ledger.jsonl","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/02_discovery -maxdepth 2 -type f -print | sort && printf '\\n-- candidate artifact exists? --\\n' && test -e /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/02_discovery/raw_candidates.jsonl && echo yes || echo no","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"wc -l /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/02_discovery/work_ledger.jsonl && rg -n -F -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/package.json' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-fly-machine/src/issuer.ts' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/package.json' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts' -e 'packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/package.json' /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/02_discovery/work_ledger.jsonl && test ! -e /var/folders/hs/pt2n3nn16k3935lw_ljnl5t40000gn/T/codex-security-scans/cyspbot/eb7e37e9240c385b9061f0f4a59a91dd8f68d287_20260710T000000Z/artifacts/02_discovery/raw_candidates.jsonl && echo 'No candidate artifact created.'","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
